channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Industry News
channel.description: Latest Industry News news in Context Engineering

item.title: ResonatorLM: Causal Resonant Field Mixing for Efficient Long-Context Language Modelin
item.description: arXiv:2607.05583v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Contemporary language models are dominated by the transformer architecture, which leverages self-attention mechanisms to enable more efficient, parallelized training across a wide set of documents and corpora. This has allowed transformers to effectiv...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> RAG, attention, product, transformer, model | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: mcp-agent - Build effective agents using Model Context Protocol and simple workflow patterns

item.title: ArtisanCAD: An Industrial-Level CAD Agent with Expert-Grounded Knowledge Distillation
item.description: arXiv:2607.05750v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Computer-aided design (CAD) for industrial components requires long-horizon procedural modeling, robust feature dependencies, editable parametric geometry, and production-grade B-Rep execution. Existing text-to-CAD methods have made promising progress...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> tool, product, model, arxiv, prompt | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 40%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)
